one_time_description: Large Province of British Columbia transfer of $9,598,958 in 2023 vs $2,930,684 in 2022, likely related to housing or settlement funding; Social Housing expenses jumped from $201,406 to $5,639,708
economic_notes: Nation operates N'Quatqua Logging Co. Ltd., N'Quatqua Fisheries Inc., and N'Quatqua Employment & Economic Development Corporation as consolidated OGOs. St'at'imc (PC) 2011 Trust established from BC Hydro settlement. NEEDCO sales revenue reported.
notes: Qualified audit opinion due to: (1) incomplete tangible capital assets listing with possible impaired/unused assets affecting amortization and net book value; (2) accounts receivable from band members of $320,448 with $245,438 significantly overdue — allowance of $56,089 identified but auditor unable to confirm adequacy. Province of BC revenue increased dramatically from $2.9M to $9.6M likely due to Social Housing funding as Social Housing expenses also jumped from $201K to $5.6M. NEEDCO sales dropped from $808,880 to $4,720 suggesting near-cessation of enterprise operations. Nation did not adopt a formal budget for FY2023 so no budget comparison presented. Total government transfers calculated as ISC + FNHA + Gov Canada + BC + CMHC + FNESC + Tribal Councils + BC Hydro + St'at'imc Trust = $15,009,638 minus non-government items; OSR includes Rental Income + Interest Income + Other Revenue + NEEDCO Sales = $280,200 — recalculated: total govt transfers = 4313156+290916+197926+9598958+35553+217973+43966+104893+206297 = 15009638; OSR = 15289838-15009638 = 280200.
